scripts.dev:auth: ALLOW_DEV_AUTH=true DEV_USER_EMAIL=dev@ntu.edu.tw npx wrangler pages dev . --port 8788
scripts.dev:auth:alt: ALLOW_DEV_AUTH=true DEV_USER_EMAIL=dev@ntu.edu.tw npx wrangler pages dev . --port 8789
scripts.d1:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply ntu-light-map --local
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply ntu-light-map --remote
